overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit city. The player walks along wet sidewalks past towering digital billboards, crosses an intersection, and enters a covered underpass with dense atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with towering digital billboards

events.description: pedestrian in gray jacket walks past on the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk next to a multi-lane road, passing illuminated digital billboards on the left

notable_agents.action: person in gray jacket walking in opposite direction passes by the camera

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screens displaying various neon advertisements on the left side of the street
tall dark building with vertical architectural lines and illuminated windows
tall street light casting bright white illumination on the wet pavement
rain-soaked multi-lane road with reflective surface and red bike lane markings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street at night. The camera walks forward along a concrete sidewalk flanked by towering digital billboards on the left displaying vibrant neon advertisements. A modern office building rises on the right while sparse traffic moves along the wet asphalt road. A pedestrian in a gray jacket briefly passes by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: exits covered sidewalk area and steps into open intersection crosswalk
turns right at the intersection while crossing the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection and turning right to follow the crosswalk markings on the wet pavement

notable_agents.action: silhouetted figure in dark clothing walking ahead across the intersection

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with white striped markings across the multi-lane road
low-rise building with three large circular ventilation fans on the facade and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection as the camera steps off the sidewalk and onto the crosswalk. The industrial building with distinctive circular ventilation fans dominates the right side while digital billboards recede into the distance on the left. The camera turns right while crossing, following the crosswalk markings on the rain-slicked asphalt. A silhouetted pedestrian walks ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with palm trees and neon storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past storefronts with glowing neon signs and palm tree planters

entered.detail: tall palm tree in a concrete planter box on the sidewalk
commercial buildings with bright neon signage including pink and green illuminated signs
concrete bench on the sidewalk near the storefronts

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the commercial street, the camera passes palm trees in concrete planters and storefronts with vibrant neon signage. The wet sidewalk reflects the colorful lights from the shops on the right. Digital billboards remain visible on the left side of the street while the camera maintains a steady walking pace past benches and street furniture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass beneath LA HUESUDA bridge with illuminated advertising panels

events.description: enters covered underpass beneath the LA HUESUDA overpass structure
lighting shifts from open neon-lit street to dimmer enclosed artificial lighting under the bridge

agents.ego_description: walking into the covered underpass, moving deeper into the tunnel-like space beneath the overpass

notable_agents.action: figure in dark clothing with red pants walking ahead into the underpass

entered.detail: large concrete bridge structure with LA HUESUDA signage spanning across the road
row of backlit advertising screens and neon signs lining the right wall of the underpass
concrete ceiling with recessed lighting fixtures creating a tunnel effect

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the covered underpass beneath the LA HUESUDA overpass, transitioning from the open street to an enclosed tunnel-like environment. The right wall is lined with illuminated advertising panels casting colorful reflections on the wet concrete. The space becomes darker and more confined, with the concrete ceiling and structural beams creating a sheltered corridor. A pedestrian in red pants walks ahead into the depths of the underpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city that transitions from an open, neon-lit boulevard into a confined urban underpass. It begins by walking along a concrete sidewalk flanked by towering digital billboards and a modern office building, passing a pedestrian in a gray jacket. As the camera steps off the curb, the scene opens into a wide intersection where the view shifts toward an industrial building with circular ventilation fans before following the crosswalk markings across the slick asphalt. The movement then continues along a commercial street lined with palm trees and vibrant storefronts that cast colorful reflections onto the wet pavement. Finally, the environment shifts from the open air into the sheltered corridor of the LA HUESUDA underpass, where the space becomes darker and more enclosed beneath structural beams and illuminated advertising panels.
